examples.text: on a microscopic level, allowing light to strike it without being scattered in different directions. But this still doesn't explain why light is able to pass through glass
examples.explanation: 这里的 scattered 指“被散射、向各个方向分开传播”。句子意思是：让光照到它上面时，光不会向不同方向散射。

source.text: 玻璃为何是透明的? ——马克·米奥多尼克
